title: ADLS Gen2 Shortcuts in Lakehouses
summary: Creating shortcuts requires a two-step process: first create a connection, then create the shortcut referencing that connection. The list-files API may not show shortcut contents, but load-table resolves them correctly.

two_step_creation.step_1_create_connection: fabio connection create --name "my-adls" --connectivity-type ShareableCloud --connection-type AzureDataLakeStorage --server "https://ACCOUNT.dfs.core.windows.net" --path "/CONTAINER" --credential-type Key --credential-key "$STORAGE_KEY" --skip-test

connection_parameters.server: The DFS endpoint WITHOUT the container: https://ACCOUNT.dfs.core.windows.net
connection_parameters.skip_test: Add --skip-test to avoid connection validation during creation (faster)

shortcut_parameters.location: Full DFS path INCLUDING the container: https://ACCOUNT.dfs.core.windows.net/CONTAINER
shortcut_parameters.sub_path: Path within the container (use / for root)
shortcut_parameters.target_type: adls for Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2

known_behaviors.list_files_limitation: fabio lakehouse list-files may not show files through ADLS shortcuts. The OneLake DFS layer virtualizes the path and may show the lakehouse structure instead of the actual storage contents. This is a Fabric API behavior, not a fabio bug.
known_behaviors.load_table_works: fabio lakehouse load-table resolves shortcut paths correctly via the Fabric backend. Files at Files/shortcutname/file.csv are accessible for table loading even when list-files does not show them.
known_behaviors.propagation_delay: After creating a shortcut, allow 5-10 seconds before accessing files through it.

what_agents_should_do: Create the connection first, capture its ID, then create the shortcut
Do NOT waste time debugging list-files if it doesn't show shortcut contents
Proceed directly to load-table using the expected path (Files/shortcutname/filename.csv)
If load-table fails with NOT_FOUND, wait 10s and retry (propagation delay)
Use --skip-test on connection create to avoid validation delays

error_patterns.connection_not_found: Shortcut creation fails if connection-id is invalid. Verify with: fabio connection show --id $CONN_ID
error_patterns.conflict_on_name: A shortcut or directory with the same name already exists. Delete it first: fabio lakehouse delete-shortcut --workspace $WS --id $LH --name NAME --path Files --force
